infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CartScout uses the camera to scan product barcodes and to photograph receipts. You can also pick receipt photos from your library to import items into your grocery lists.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CartScout needs access to your photo library when you choose an existing receipt image to import line items into your grocery lists.

plugins.cameraPermission: CartScout uses the camera to scan product barcodes and to photograph receipts. You can also pick receipt photos from your library to import items into your grocery lists.

plugins.photosPermission: CartScout needs access to your photo library when you choose an existing receipt image to import line items into your grocery lists.
